column1: # Anonymization map — single source of truth for scrubbing the public repo.
# `anonymize.py --check` (fail-closed gate). Edit THIS file when a new project
# or identifier appears, then re-run sync. One rule per line, TAB-separated:
# Rules are applied longest-pattern-first automatically, so more-specific
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
# --- home-path tokenization (longer than the pool rule, so these win first) ---
# --- project codenames (real -> generic; edit/extend as projects appear) ---
